content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/prisma/schema.prisma:1	generator client {2	  provider = "prisma-client-js"3	}4	5	datasource db {6	  provider = "sqlite"7	  url      = "file:./dev.db"8	}9	10	model User {11	  id            String    @id @default(cuid())12	  name          String?13	  email         String?   @unique14	  password      String?15	  role          String    @default("USER") // USER, OWNER, ADMIN16	  restaurants   Restaurant[]17	  orders        Order[]18	  createdAt     DateTime  @default(now())19	  updatedAt     DateTime  @updatedAt20	}21	22	model Restaurant {23	  id          String     @id @default(cuid())24	  name        String25	  description String?26	  address     String?27	  ownerId     String28	  owner       User       @relation(fields: [ownerId], references: [id])29	  menuItems   MenuItem[]30	  orders      Order[]31	  createdAt   DateTime   @default(now())32	  updatedAt   DateTime   @updatedAt33	}34	35	model MenuItem {36	  id           String     @id @default(cuid())37	  name         String38	  description  String?39	  price        Float40	  restaurantId String41	  restaurant   Restaurant @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id])42	  orderItems   OrderItem[]43	  createdAt    DateTime   @default(now())44	  updatedAt    DateTime   @updatedAt45	}46	47	model Order {48	  id           String      @id @default(cuid())49	  userId       String50	  user         User        @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])51	  restaurantId String52	  restaurant   Restaurant  @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id])53	  items        OrderItem[]54	  status       String      @default("PENDING") // PENDING, PREPARING, READY, DELIVERED, CANCELLED55	  total        Float56	  createdAt    DateTime    @default(now())57	  updatedAt    DateTime    @updatedAt58	}59	60	model OrderItem {61	  id         String   @id @default(cuid())62	  orderId    String63	  order      Order    @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id])64	  menuItemId String65	  menuItem   MenuItem @relation(fields: [menuItemId], references: [id])66	  quantity   Int67	  price      Float68	  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())69	  updatedAt  DateTime @updatedAt70	}
